episodes.title: Service Beyond the Military: Brittinie Wick on Women Veterans, AI in Defense & the Power of Purpose
episodes.description: In this episode of The Vector Podcast, Christian Perez sits down with Brittinie Wick — US Air Force veteran, Doctor of Physical Therapy, and founder of the @WomenServeToo podcast. Brittinie shares how her childhood sparked her path to military service, what the transition to civilian life really looks like when your identity has been built around the mission, and why mental health remains one of the most critical and underserved issues facing veterans today. The conversation covers the growing role of AI in military operations, the unique challenges women veterans face in gaining recognition for their service, and why Brittinie believes standards should never be lowered regardless of gender. They also dig into how social media is driving polarization, why open and honest conversations are more important than ever, and what it means to find purpose after the uniform comes off.

episodes.title: What If This Could Be Better? – A Veteran's Approach to Innovation with A'Yana Leonard
episodes.description: In this episode of The Vector Podcast, host Christian Perez sits down with A'Yana Leonard—U.S. Army veteran, former Director of Marketing and Digital Strategy, and self-taught technologist exploring AI, cloud systems, and even FPGA hardware.

episodes.title: Leading Through the Cloud: Daniel Gaina on AI & the Human Domain in the era of Autonomous Agents
episodes.description: In this episode of the Vector Podcast, host Christian Perez engages in an in-depth conversation with Daniel Gaina, Senior Cloud Engineer and AWS Community Builder, to explore the intersection of technical expertise, leadership, and the evolving role of artificial intelligence in modern cloud engineering. Daniel shares his compelling journey from a non-technical background to earning AWS's prestigious Golden Jacket certification; a distinction requiring mastery across 12+ AWS specializations. The discussion examines the critical importance of certifications as foundational knowledge tools, the irreplaceable value of community engagement, and the human-centered leadership skills that distinguish exceptional technologists from merely competent ones. As AI and agentic systems reshape the technology landscape, Perez and Gaina emphasize that sustained success in tech demands not just technical proficiency, but emotional intelligence, accountability, and the capacity for meaningful human connection.

episodes.title: Empowering Minds: AI, Neurodiversity & The Future of Mental Healthcare with Jay Getten
episodes.description: On this episode of The Vector Podcast I sat down with Jay Getten, a mental health innovator, author, and creator of open-source clinical decision support software. In this profound conversation, Jay shares his transformative journey from special education teacher to developing precision mental healthcare software.

episodes.title: Ethics, Education, and Empathy in the Age of AI with Dr. Sarah Mendoza
episodes.description: In this episode of The Vector Podcast, Dr. Sarah Mendoza of Austin Peay State University joins Christian Perez to explore how artificial intelligence is transforming human-centered work. Drawing from her background in counseling and higher education, Dr. Mendoza reflects on the realities of clinical practice, the ethics of data and privacy, and the role of empathy in a world increasingly shaped by technology.

episodes.title: Part 2: AI Integration - From Concept to Competitive Edge
episodes.description: In this episode of the Vector Podcast, we dive deep into the world of AI Integration, the second pillar in our three-part series on AI competency. Join us as we explore how to effectively weave AI tools into your business operations to create real, measurable value. Discover a clear three-step system for integrating AI, learn how to avoid common pitfalls, and understand the importance of process mapping and human-AI collaboration. With insights from leading research and real-world examples, this episode is packed with actionable strategies to help you transform AI from an expensive calculator into a strategic advantage. Whether you're just starting or looking to scale your AI initiatives, this episode offers valuable guidance to ensure your AI integration is successful and sustainable. Don't miss out on the opportunity to enhance productivity, drive revenue growth, and build a culture of innovation. Tune in now and take the next step in your AI journey!

episodes.title: Part 1: AI Literacy - The First Step to Future-Proofing Your Career
episodes.description: In this engaging episode of the Vector Podcast, we dive into the essential skills needed to thrive in today's AI-driven world. Christian introduces the first part of a three-part series, "The 3 Pillars of AI Competency," focusing on AI literacy. Discover why AI literacy is not just a buzzword but a critical skill for employability, as two-thirds of hiring managers prioritize candidates with AI skills. Learn about the three modes of AI literacy—understanding, evaluating, and using AI ethically—and how they align with career readiness competencies like critical thinking and communication.

episodes.title: Special Edition - VA Rating Assistant with Christopher Lassiter
episodes.description: Join us as we delve into the inspiring journey of Chris Lassiter, a Navy Chief and seasoned web developer, who has embraced the world of AI and AWS. Discover how Chris leveraged his expertise to create the VA Rating Assistant, a groundbreaking tool designed to streamline the VA claims process for veterans. From participating in AWS hackathons to mastering cloud technologies, Chris shares his insights on the transformative power of AI and his vision for the future. Tune in to learn how AI is reshaping industries and empowering individuals to turn their innovative ideas into reality.

episodes.title: Ep. 1 - Welcome to The Vector Podcast
episodes.description: Hosted by Christian Perez—Founder & CEO of Altivum Inc., creator of VetROI, and author of Beyond the Assessment.
